title: General BIC BioProject to use if no other BioProjects apply
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5veng","text":"Our protocols are constantly evolving and old versions will be deleted.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8cukq","text":"The documents here are not intended to be cited in publications","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: If you are submitting GenBank sequences that came from a BIC specimen but do not belong to another BioProject (e.g., DDT, Southern California Borderlands), please link your sequences to the following BIC BioProject with Accession PRJNA1136884: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/bioproject/1136884
If your GenBank sequences merit their own BioProject, use the Bioprojects protocol to create a new one
creator: Charlotte A Seid
